on the 4th lunar day of the dark fortnight in the asterism of Purva-
bhadra, the rainy season will prove beneficial; otherwise not.

GhapUr XXVII—The Wind Circle
[According to Utpala this chapter is spurious, as it is patently
redundant. But, he says, this section is found in many books.
So he comments for the benefit of students.]
